name: hitl-approval
description: Create agent with approval_required tool, approve via CLI
query: Create an agent that can delete files but needs my approval before actually deleting anything.
expected_behavior: Show the user how to approve: agentspan agent respond <id> --approve
Explain the execution will pause at the tool call
success_criteria: Uses rt.start() not rt.run() so user can approve
Provides the agentspan agent respond command
